description.ko: 단단한 구조가 무채색 기하학의 정밀하고 글리치가 가득한 디지털 폭발로 붕괴되는 통제된 카오스에 대한 연구입니다.
description.en: A study of controlled chaos where a solid structure disintegrates into a precise, glitch-heavy digital explosion of monochrome geometry.

prompt: A brutalist digital sculpture by KURO-X, titled 'The Fractal Defragmentation.' A massive #1A1A1A obsidian monolith undergoing a systematic geometric collapse, shattering into thousands of #808080 and #C0C0C0 razor-sharp polygonal shards. Set within a clinical #FFFFFF void, the scene is intersected by heavy digital glitch artifacts, pixel sorting layers, and sharp RGB chromatic aberration slicing through the composition. High-contrast ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian planes. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing the mathematical elegance of digital corruption.
